前線基地、娼館。普段から人の集まる場所ではあるが、<br>その夜は苛立たしげに時:
The Frontline Base brothel. It was always a busy place, but that night
it was overflowing with customers irritably killing time.
どうして何人も同時に体調不良になるのっ！<br>娼館のスタッフが全然足りないわっ:
Why do several people have to get sick at once? We're completely
understaffed at the brothel!
なんとかスケジュールを調整してみたが、<br>せめてもう１人はいないと予約の客も:
I managed to adjust the schedule, but we can't handle the
reservations without at least one more person.
もう何時間も待たせてるっていうのに、帰らせるしかないなんて。<br>楽しみに来て:
After hours of waiting, we have to send them home. I can't tell that
to the customers looking forward to it.
こんばんは～。<br>お菓子のお届けに参りました～。: Good evening. Mil's come with the sweets delivery.
あ……ありがとう、ミルティーユさん。<br>ちょっとお客様を待たせちゃってるから:
Ah... thank you, Myrtille. We have customers waiting, so this is a big
help.
ご利用ありがとうございます～。<br>きっとみんな、ミルのお菓子で笑顔になるよ～:
Thanks for your business! Mil's sure everyone will be all smiles with
Mil's sweets.
ふわふわと愛らしい笑顔で言うミルティーユ。<br>その優しげな所作、やわらかく豊:
Myrtille spoke with a soft, lovely smile. Ludia's eyes gleamed at her
gentle mannerisms and soft, full figure.
――司令官君。<br>この子……すごくいいものを持ってるわね……？:
—Commander, darling. That girl... she's got quite an asset, hasn't
she?
スタイルも性格も、何もかも理想的だとは思うが。<br>ただ配達に来ただけなんだ、:
I think her figure and personality are ideal in every way. But she's
just here to deliver. Don't make any strange propositions.
でもこのままじゃお店の信頼に傷がつくわ。<br>本人が望むなら手伝ってもらっても:
But if this keeps up, it'll damage the establishment's reputation. If
she's willing, don't you think she could help?
……ちゃんと同意したら、だぞ。: ...Only if she properly agrees, got it?
そうこなくちゃ！<br>ミルティーユさん、ちょっと相談してもいいかしら？: That's more like it! Myrtille, could I talk to you for a moment?
はーい？<br>どうかしましたか～、ルディアさん？: Yeees? What's the matter, Ms. Ludia...?
実は娼館の人手が足りなくて、お客様を待たせちゃってるのよ。<br>ミルティーユさ:
We're short-handed at the brothel and we've kept customers waiting.
Myrtille, could you help out, even just tonight?
別に難しくはないのよ？ 男の人の身体に溜まった、えっと……そう！<br>シロップ:
It's not hard, you know? A man builds up... syrup. So you squeeze it
out and he's refreshed. Simple!
（男の人のシロップって、この前しれーかんさまとしたこと……？<br>ど、どうしよ:
(The man's syrup... Is that what Mil did with Commander before?
Wh-what should I do?)
（いつもお菓子を買ってくれるルディアさんは困ってるみたいですし<br>それに……:
(Ms. Ludia, who always buys sweets from me, seems to be in trouble...
and besides... Commander is also...)
あの、しれーかんさまは、ミルがここで働いたら助かりますか……？: Um, Commander, if Mil worked here, would it help you...?
だったら――分かり、ました。<br>やってみます……っ！:
Then— Mil... Mil understands.
Mil will give it a try...!
あの、このお店で働くのははじめてなので、<br>もし間違ってたら教えて、ください:
Um, since it's Mil's first time working here,
if Mil makes a mistake, please let Mil know, okay...?
